title: Doctor's Best High Absorption Magnesium Glycinate Lysinate Supplement for Sleep Support - Chelated Magnesium Tablets for Women & Men, 200mg per Serving, Supports Calm & Relaxation, Vegan - 240 Count
breadCrumbs: Health & Household > Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements > Minerals > Magnesium

items.title: Ingredients
items.text: Magnesium (elemental) (from 2,000 mg magnesium glycinate lysinate chelate) 100 mg, Microcrystalline cellulose, croscarmellose sodium, magnesium stearate (vegetable source), stearic acid, modified cellulose (coating).

items.title: Directions
items.text: As a dietary supplement, take 2 tablets twice daily, with or without food. Store in a cool dry place.

items.title: Legal Disclaimer
items.text: Statements regarding dietary supplements have not been evaluated by the FDA and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition.

features: MAGNESIUM GLYCINATE LYSINATE SUPPLEMENT: Our formula provides support for muscles, nerves, & sleep quality. It's 100% chelated, making it easy on the digestive tract & able to be taken any time of day
MAXIMUM ABSORPTION: Magnesium glycinate is good, lysinate glycinate is even better. Our magnesium mineral supplement takes the most direct route into your system for up to 6x better absorption
SLEEP AND MUSCLE RELAXATION: Magnesium supports healthy, restful sleep and relaxation by helping regulate melatonin, cortisol, and muscle function for overall wellness
200 MG PER SERVING: Our mag glycinate supplement is not buffered with fillers or additives and is 200mg per serving, vegan, non-GMO, gluten-free, and soy-free. Each bottle contains 240 tablets
DOCTOR'S BEST: Good nutrition starts with sound science. For over 35 years, we have been dedicated to providing only thoroughly researched, rigorously tested, and clinically-approved supplements

aPlusContent.title: Product description
aPlusContent.rawText:
Product description
Previous page
Next page
What does magnesium do? 
Magnesium is known to provide support for muscle relaxation, nerve function, and overall sleep quality.* 
How does this magnesium feel on the stomach? 
This product uses chelated magnesium lysinate glycinate, a form known for supporting gentle digestion. It's generally well tolerated and less likely to cause stomach discomfort than other forms.* 
How many tablets per day? 
The typical adult dosage for this product is 2 tablets twice daily, or as recommended by a nutritionally informed physician. 
What makes this form of magnesium special? 
This product uses magnesium lysinate glycinate, a chelated form bound to amino acids. The structure is designed to support efficient absorption and is commonly chosen for its gentle digestive profile compared to other magnesium form.* 
Is this vegan-friendly? 
Yes, the Doctor's Best High Absorption Magnesium Glycinate Lysinate is vegan-friendly. The supplement uses magnesium stearate from vegetable sources and has no dairy, gelatin, or other animal products - making it suitable for plant-based diets.

aiReviewsSummary.text: Customers find this magnesium supplement effective for muscle cramps and headaches, with one noting it lowers blood pressure. The supplement receives positive feedback for its quality, value, and sleep benefits, helping people fall asleep faster. While some customers say it's easy on their tummy, others report stomach pain and heartburn. The pill size receives mixed reactions, with several customers finding it difficult to swallow.

keywords.text: Customers find the magnesium supplement effective, reporting it helps with muscle cramps and headaches, and one customer mentions it lowers blood pressure.

title: Natural Vitality Calm Magnesium 16oz Powder | Raspberry Lemon Flavored Supplement | Non-GMO, Vegan & Gluten Free Formula
breadCrumbs: Health & Household > Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements > Minerals > Magnesium

items.title: Safety Information
items.text: Use as directed. High doses of magnesium can result in nausea, abdominal cramping and/or diarrhea.

items.title: Directions
items.text: Start with half teaspoon (1g) daily and gradually increase to two teaspoons (4g) per day as needed. Place powder in glass or mug, add 2-3 oz. of hot or cold water. Let it fizz, then stir until dissolved. Drink and enjoy!

items.title: Legal Disclaimer
items.text: The Food and Drug Administration have not evaluated these statements. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.Statements regarding dietary supplements have not been evaluated by the FDA and are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition.

description: Natural Vitality CALM Magnesium Supplement Drink Mix is a convenient powder drink mix that helps support healthy magnesium levels while delivering a calming experience you can feel (1). Formulated with magnesium carbonate and citric acid, Natural CALM magnesium powder combines with water to create a magnesium citrate solution, which is better absorbed than magnesium oxide. Help manage stress, release tension and calm your mind with this magnesium drink (1). These vegan, gluten-free magnesium supplements have a delicious raspberry lemon taste and contain no sugar, artificial flavor or synthetic color. Simply mix this powder drink mix with water for a delicious beverage you can enjoy hot, cold, day, night or anytime you could use a calm moment. (1) These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
features: DIETARY SUPPLEMENT: One 16 oz. bottle of Natural Vitality CALM Magnesium Supplement Drink Mix that helps support healthy magnesium levels and a healthy response to stress
SUPPORT BALANCED MOOD: Magnesium CALM powder helps manage stress, release tension and relax your mind for a calming experience you can feel (1)
MAGNESIUM CITRATE SUPPLEMENT: Magnesium carbonate and citric acid, when combined with water, create a solution of magnesium citrate, which is better absorbed than magnesium oxide
325 MG OF MAGNESIUM PER SERVING: Contains 325 mg of magnesium per serving to support over 300 cellular processes in your body, including heart and brain function
FIZZY DRINK MIX: Magnesium carbonate, citric acid, stevia (leaf) extract and natural flavor combine to create a raspberry lemon-flavored powder drink mix that mixes with water to create a fizzy drink
NON-GMO PROJECT VERIFIED: Liquid drink mix is Non-GMO Project Verified, vegan, gluten-free and made without sugar, artificial flavor or synthetic color
DAILY SUPPLEMENT FOR ADULTS: Start with 1/2 teaspoon daily, gradually increasing to 2 teaspoons daily; just mix with water, fizz, sip, chill and feel the power of CALM
FOR MAXIMIZING REST AND RELAXATION: Since 1982, Natural Vitality CALM has been providing stress relief and relaxation as well as sleep support through the power of magnesium sourced from the sea (1)
HEALTHY AND HAPPY LIVING: Natural Vitality has a commitment to calmfulness, equality and holistic sustainability, which helps to make products that make life easier and lessen stress in your life

BEST SELLING: Natural Vitality is the best-selling magnesium supplement brand in the Natural Products Market. (2) (2) March 2023 unit sales data for Natural Products Market as defined by SPINS (941) (150)

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: As per my GE,  Magnesium CITRATE is the ONLY type of Magnesium that the body can FULLY assimilate
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Magnesium is a miracle mineral.  And vital to your good health.  From restful sleep, to no more leg cramps, to a more stable blood pressure and no more constipation, the results of its daily use, -every morning before breakfast- are nothing short of a wonder.  And there are very compelling facts behind it:As per my GE,  Magnesium CITRATE is the ONLY type of Magnesium that the body can FULLY assimilate, which is the type in THIS product specifically.Magnesium's importance has not been promoted enough within the medical community, and its importance as EQUALLY important as Calcium:A Magnesium reserve is hold by your heart in one of its chambers.  Calcium contracts, Magnesium relaxes: Systole and Diastole.Do your research:  From Constipation to energy metabolism, DNA replication, protein synthesis and detoxification, all rely on Magnesium.  Muscle pain and tightness, weight gain -magnesium control the enzymes that controls digestion and absorption-, to unexplained fatigue, depression and anxiety, all are Magnesium deficiencies symptoms.With the highest amount of magnesium in your body concentrated in your heart,  its deficiency may be  behind your high or low blood pressure.According to NHS, Magnesium helps to turn the food we eat into energy, the production of hormones for bone health in the parathyroid glands, heart health and blood sugar control.Again as per NHS, It is estimated that 80% of Americans are Magnesium deficient.And back to my GE doctor's :  Only Magnesium Citrate is  fully absorbed by the body.  And very easy to know if you take too much:  For a short time...Diarrhea.  This product is great... The taste is pleasant, it dissolves quickly in warm water and you can easily learn the amount you need to take just based on the dosage that produces a perfect bowel movement.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: A long review but worth the read if you suffer from IBS
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I just ordered a bunch more of this stuff from Amazon. I can't really rate the product based on my Amazon purchase but I can talk about the product itself as I've been using it daily for nearly a month now. It is widely available at most Vitamin shops and health food stores but you get much more for your money ordering it through Amazon. I caution everyone when ordering to make sure it is the non GMO kind. I've seen both (regular and non GMO) and it doesn't make sense to me why anyone would order a GMO laden vitamin supplement. But that is just me. Ok, on to the review of the product itself.It is awesome!! I initially purchased it because of the calming effects of the bowels. I suffer from horrible IBS and it has been affecting my quality of life for years. I've been on meds, supplements, special diets, etc etc for years to assist in relief. Much of my IBS is stress related on a subconscious level. Meaning I am stressed out about things but they're not in the forefront of my mind to be able to pinpoint what I'm worried about. Additionally I suffer from generalized anxiety disorder which makes me a worry wart about everything! It is truly miserable at times. For years I suffered with IBS-D (diarrhea dominant) but over the last year or so it has changed to C (constipation) dominant. With the change came even more bathroom troubles and hemmorhoids. Not fun stuff at all. The hemmorhoids are also a hereditary thing so I knew that at some point I'd get them plus having a traumatic stage 4 tear while birthing my son just did that much more damage. In any case, I knew if I didn't do something quickly to assist in this issue, I'd likely be looking at surgery to correct them. So I ordered a squatty potty which helped somewhat but it wasn't helping me to "go". I got to the point that I was drinking two bottles of the mega magnesium citrate a week to be able to go to the bathroom. Two days a week were dedicated to the toilet and that's it. How miserable is that?! I had tried every supplement and OTC med and homeopathic remedy that I could think of. Because I would get so backed up I had constant chest pressure which exacerbated my anxiety symptoms and I have ended up in the ER more than once for chest pain that ended up being trapped gas due to constipation. Something had to give. In one of my sessions of hell (in the bathroom) I became desperate and started googling my symptoms and was relieved (and shocked) that so many people suffered like I did. Not that I wanted others to suffer but because deep in my mind I thought I was suffering from some deadly disease of my guts that nobody could diagnose and one day I would be found dead on the toilet. Sounds dramatic but that's what I felt. In my search for answers I kept coming across magnesium as some sort of miracle cure. I scoffed at the idea initially because I'd tried it before for anxiety and had no luck with it AND it make my constipation worse. Then I started to wonder if maybe, just maybe, my body wasn't absorbing it properly because I had taken it in pill form. I kept seeing this "Natural Calm" being mentioned and thought about it. Honestly I came on Amazon and read the rave reviews but still held off on getting any because it has to be added to liquid and drank (and being super sensitive to taste, I didn't think it would do any good if I didn't use it because I couldn't handle the taste). Then one day I had an exceptionally bad "bathroom day" and decided that I didn't care what it tasted like and was desperate because otherwise I was just going to make up my will and let my stomach kill me. So I went to a local Vitamin shop and purchased a bottle. After purchasing it, I continued to read reviews and watching videos of testimonials and said "screw it" and made myself a cup. The first time I made it I got really freaked out at how much effervescence there was. It reminded me of alka seltzer (which I HATE) and was scared to drink it (I have a legit fear of vomiting). But it smelled good (raspberry lemon) so I just stirred it up until it was clear and proceeded to drink it. I didn't get sick from tasting it. I won't say it was delicious, but it definitely didn't taste bad. I drank the entire cup and within about 15 minutes I could physically feel a sense of "calmness" (honestly, I felt stoned). I went to bed shortly thereafter. When I woke up in the morning, I didn't feel groggy at all. I actually felt pretty good (and morning are usually difficult for me). I got about halfway through my cup of coffee and the bathroom was calling me. So I begrudgingly went expecting for it to be like every other day but much to my elation, I went very quickly and with less pain than normal. How exciting!! That night I drank another cup and had a morning like the previous one the next day. This was obviously working for my tummy so I kept at it. One night I got a panic attack (out of nowhere and for no reason). As I felt it building, I decided that I would reach for my Natural Calm instead of my Xanax. I will tell you right now that if you think this product will work like anxiety meds and that's why you want it, save your money because it won't. However it did take the edge off of the attack enough for me to use other techniques like deep breathing and acupressure to relieve panic symptoms. That was huge for me! I took a slightly higher amount than I had been taking (about a teaspoon) because I was trying to reduce anxiety symptoms. This in turn assisted in a much larger bowel movement the next morning. And I felt amazing!Fast forward to a month later (now). I have been taking this daily. Prior to starting this supplement my medication regimen in the morning consisted of the following:4 Aleve (I've had three shoulder surgeries and have lots of stiffness and pain)1 0.5mg Xanax1 20mg Omeprazole4 180mg Simethicone caps4 stool stool softeners2 TRC constipation pills2 TRC IBS pills1 probioticToday I take:1 Aleve1/2 Xanax1 Omeprazole1 probioticThat is a 12 pill reduction in a month!This has helped my stomach as well as my joints and muscles. My anxiety has been assisted but I also think that a lot of my daily anxiety symptoms were due to all of the pressure in my stomach rising to my chest cavity. My hemmorhoids have also been drastically reduced and are nearly all healed at this point. I will never be without this product!Helpful tips:Drink a glass of water before drinking your cup of natural calm. Then drink one after. The magnesium needs a lot of water or it can dehydrate you. And if you're dehydrated it will not help your bowels.Start slowly. Figure out what works best for you. I started with a teaspoon at night. I now take two HEAPING teaspoons (or close to that. I eyeball it).Make sure to take it at least two hours after eating. This product needs stomach acid to properly work. If your body is working hard to digest food, it won't properly assist in the absorption of the magnesium (and if you have IBS or other stomach issues you shouldn't be eating within 2 hours of bed anyway).This is not a "cure all" and if you suffer from any sort of bowel dysfunction you need to also manage your diet. But when all else fails, this kicks it up.I rated 4/5 stars simply because I haven't noticed a significant reduction in my anxiety symptoms. Some, but not enough to say it works specifically for that. I've heard of others being able to go off of anxiety meds by replacing this with the medication. I am looking into doing that myself and should I be able to supplement this for the meds, I will update to 5/5. It is an amazing product though.

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I purchased this for the benefits of magnesium.  It was recommended to me by a family member.  However, as I generally only drink water (plain), I could not get used to the flavor.  My family member loves it and was very pleased when I gifted her the remainder of this.  She drank this each night during her pregnancy and swore it helped her to get a good nights sleep and she continues to use this each evening.  She was so happy to use up the remainder of my purchase for me and even recommended that I try to drink it in a concentrated formula.  However, I chose to go with a magnesium supplement in another form.  I am giving this 5 stars based on her opinion, belief, and use of this product.
